sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Amazon, Morgan Stanley, Leidos And An Energy Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: During CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades," experts discussed their top stock picks. Sarat Sethi recommended Morgan Stanley, citing strong wealth management tailwinds and its future digital wallet plans. Bill Baruch highlighted Leidos Holdings for its promising chart and balance sheet, while Jenny Harrington suggested Enterprise Products Partners for its attractive 6.9% dividend yield. Lastly, Joshua Brown picked Amazon.com, buoyed by a maintained Buy rating and an increased price target from Jefferies.

feed.title: Prediction: 2 Healthcare Stocks That Will Be Worth More Than Pfizer by the End of 2026
feed.summary: This article predicts that Vertex Pharmaceuticals and Medtronic could surpass Pfizer in market value by the end of 2026. While Pfizer faces challenges with patent cliffs and a dwindling COVID-19 franchise, Vertex and Medtronic are expected to see strong growth due to new product approvals, robust clinical pipelines, and strategic business moves. The author highlights Vertex's success with cystic fibrosis treatments and new pain medication, and Medtronic's strong performance in medical devices and potential for value creation post-diabetes unit split.

feed.title: JPMorgan Increases Price Target for Ross Stores (ROST) to $215
feed.summary: JPMorgan has raised its price target for Ross Stores (ROST) to $215 from $200, maintaining an Overweight rating and adding the company to its Analyst Focus List. This increase is based on fieldwork suggesting Ross Stores will exceed its own fourth-quarter same-store sales guidance, with JPMorgan now predicting a 5.5% growth. Despite strong financial health and positive analyst sentiment, the stock is considered modestly overvalued with a GF Score of 94.

feed.title: TEREMANA® TEQUILA PARTNERS WITH WINGSTOP TO CELEBRATE FANS OF FLAVOR THIS POSTSEASON
feed.summary: Teremana Tequila, founded by Dwayne Johnson, has partnered with Wingstop to celebrate game day. The "Fans of Flavor" partnership offers a pairing generator for wings and margaritas, and a nationwide sweepstakes with prizes like an Ultimate Game Day Flavor Fest and gift cards. This collaboration emphasizes shared moments, bold flavors, and bringing people together over food and drinks.

feed.title: The Treasure Hunt Moat: A Deep Dive into Ross Stores (ROST) in 2026
feed.summary: This article analyzes Ross Stores (ROST) in early 2026, highlighting its strong position in the off-price retail sector due to its "treasure hunt" physical-first model. It discusses the company's historical transformation, robust financial performance including beating Q3 2025 earnings estimates, and a pivotal leadership transition positioning it for continued growth, especially through geographic expansion and its dd's DISCOUNTS brand. Despite risks like shrink and wage inflation, Ross Stores' defensive characteristics make it a compelling investment, with analysts cautiously optimistic about its path to over $200 per share.

feed.title: The Truth About Snap-on Inc.: Why Everyone Is Suddenly Paying Attention
feed.summary: Snap-on Inc. (SNA) is gaining quiet attention on Wall Street for its stable stock performance, strong business model rooted in premium tools for professionals, and consistent dividend payments. Despite not being a viral brand, it holds significant "clout" within its niche of mechanics and tradespeople, offering a long-term investment opportunity for those seeking stability and consistent returns over speculative growth. The article presents Snap-on as a "sleep at night" stock, appealing to investors focused on compounding wealth rather than meme-driven market volatility.

feed.title: UAL: Susquehanna Raises Price Target Amid Positive Outlook | UAL Stock News
feed.summary: Susquehanna has reiterated its "Positive" rating for United Airlines Holdings (UAL) and significantly increased its price target from $117 to $150, a 28.21% jump, indicating strong confidence in the airline's future performance. This positive outlook is supported by similar upgrades from other firms like TD Cowen, Citigroup, and B of A Securities. Despite an average target price of $128.33 from analysts suggesting an 11.14% upside, GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $68.95, implying a potential 40.29% downside from the current price.

feed.title: Lam Research stock hits all-time high at 210.45 USD
feed.summary: Lam Research (LRCX) stock soared to an all-time high of $210.45, reflecting strong investor confidence and solid financial health with a 163.24% one-year total return and 25.66% revenue growth. The company, a prominent player in the semiconductor industry, has received positive analyst ratings and expanded its physical presence. However, InvestingPro data suggests the stock might be trading above its Fair Value, warranting close monitoring of valuation metrics.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Insulet to $365 From $388, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Insulet Corporation (PODD) to $365, down from the previous $388, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This update reflects a revised valuation perspective from the financial institution. Insulet specializes in medical devices for insulin-dependent diabetes, with its Omnipod systems being a key product.

feed.title: The Live Music Hegemon: A Deep Dive into Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) ahead of the 2026 Antitrust Trial
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) is a dominant force in the live music industry, having grown significantly through strategic consolidation and its "flywheel" business model encompassing concerts, ticketing via Ticketmaster, and sponsorship. Despite its strong financial performance and record revenues, the company faces a critical antitrust trial with the U.S. Department of Justice in March 2026, which could force a divestiture of Ticketmaster and fundamentally alter its structure. The outcome of this trial will be a major determinant for investor sentiment, though the secular demand for live experiences continues to provide a strong underlying tailwind for the company.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Price Target on EPAM Systems to $243 From $212, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has increased its price target for EPAM Systems (NYSE: EPAM) shares from $212 to $243, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the analyst firm on the IT services and consulting company. The updated target price suggests a positive sentiment regarding EPAM Systems' future performance.

feed.title: DAL: Susquehanna Raises Delta Air Lines Price Target to $85 | DA
feed.summary: Susquehanna has maintained a "Positive" rating on Delta Air Lines (DAL) and increased its price target to $85, up from $70. This update follows similar positive sentiments from other analysts like TD Cowen, B of A Securities, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, and UBS, all of whom have raised their price targets for DAL recently. Despite these positive analyst forecasts, which show an average target price of $77.46, GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $47.90, suggesting a potential downside for the stock.

feed.title: Crown Castle stock hits 52-week low at 84.12 USD
feed.summary: Crown Castle International Corp (CCI) stock hit a 52-week low of $84.12, although InvestingPro data suggests it is undervalued and analysts expect a return to profitability this year. The company posted a 1.57% total return over the past year despite a recent decline and offers a substantial 5.03% dividend yield. Recent positive third-quarter results led to increased guidance, and analysts maintain a HOLD rating with an eye on upcoming earnings.

feed.title: Ball Corp. Is Quietly Owning Your Drinks — But Is This Stock a Sneaky Must-Cop or Total Flop?
feed.summary: Ball Corp., a major can and packaging manufacturer, recently divested its aerospace unit to focus entirely on sustainable packaging, particularly aluminum cans. This strategic pivot and the growing trend towards eco-friendly packaging place Ball Corp. as a significant player in a stable, long-term market rather than a volatile meme stock. Investors interested in exposure to sustainability and steady growth might find BLL a worthwhile addition to their portfolio.

feed.title: Phillips 66 stock rating reiterated at Buy by UBS on refinery closure impact
feed.summary: UBS has reiterated its Buy rating on Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) with a $160.00 price target, despite adjusting its Q4 2025 EPS estimate to $2.05 due to additional DD&A expense from a refinery closure. The firm anticipates the company will reduce debt by approximately $1.3 billion through asset sales and working capital release, alongside planned share buybacks. This comes amidst mixed analyst opinions, with Freedom Capital Markets downgrading the stock to Sell, while Mizuho maintains a Neutral rating following Phillips 66's acquisition of Lindsey Oil Refinery assets in the UK.

feed.title: MarketAxess stock price target lowered to $225 by UBS on credit metrics
feed.summary: UBS has reduced its price target for MarketAxess (NASDAQ:MKTX) to $225 from $240, while maintaining a Buy rating. The adjustment follows MarketAxess's December metrics release, which showed lower-than-expected credit fee per million, and UBS has also lowered its fiscal year 2026 forecast by 1%. Despite the reduction, UBS remains constructive on credit volumes for 2026, projecting 13% growth, largely driven by non-US markets.

feed.title: UBS reiterates Buy rating on Targa Resources stock with $228 price target
feed.summary: UBS has maintained its Buy rating on Targa Resources (NYSE:TRGP) with a $228 price target, citing strong operational performance, robust Permian volumes, and successful project execution. The firm projects Targa's Q4 2025 EBITDA to be $1,265 million and expects free cash flow growth in 2027, underpinning continued financial strength for the midstream energy company. This reiteration comes alongside Targa's recent $1.25 billion acquisition of Stakeholder Midstream, which is expected to expand its infrastructure and enhance operations in the Permian Basin.

feed.title: Cisco – Sustainability Trends for 2026: From Boardroom Decisions to Real-World Systems
feed.summary: Cisco outlines key sustainability trends for 2026, emphasizing its evolution from a standalone initiative to a core business discipline. The company highlights the integration of sustainability into strategic planning, advancements in circularity beyond basic recycling, the scaling of innovation in energy systems, and the growing impact of AI on energy demand. Cisco also discusses the emerging need for quantum-safe networks and preparing for future quantum technologies.

feed.title: Will Airbus Or Boeing Climb Higher In 2026? (OTCMKTS:EADSY)
feed.summary: The article discusses the competitive landscape between Airbus (EADSY) and Boeing (BA) for 2026, favoring Airbus due to its operational stability, higher margins, and robust commercial aircraft portfolio, while Boeing addresses deficiencies. Both companies benefit from a strong duopoly and extensive order backlogs, driven by strong global travel demand, but face challenges from supply chain constraints and engine reliability issues. Neither company is expected to release new major aircraft, with Airbus focusing on enhancing current models and Boeing on certifications.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines stock hits 52-week high at $44.20
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines stock recently achieved a 52-week high of $44.20, closing at $44.28, reflecting a 33.39% increase over the past year and indicating growing investor confidence. Despite this surge and recent upgrades from JPMorgan based on strong earnings outlooks, InvestingPro data suggests the stock may be overvalued with a steep P/E ratio, and Wells Fargo initiated coverage with an "Equal Weight" rating. The airline also announced a strategic partnership with Turkish Airlines but faces challenges from major travel disruptions due to winter storms.

feed.title: Alaska Airlines Pilot Files $10M Lawsuit Against Boeing, Alleges Company Shifted Blame After Mid-Air Blowout
feed.summary: Captain Brandon Fisher, the pilot who safely landed an Alaska Airlines Boeing 737 Max 9 after a door plug blew out, is suing Boeing for $10 million. He alleges that Boeing attempted to shift blame onto him following the incident, despite an NTSB investigation concluding it was due to manufacturing defects. Fisher’s lawsuit claims severe emotional distress and states the FBI told him he may have been a victim of criminally negligent conduct by Boeing.

feed.title: Vale stock slips before the U.S. open as Scotiabank flags iron ore glut risk
feed.summary: Vale S.A.'s U.S.-listed shares fell 1.3% in premarket trading after Scotiabank downgraded the Brazilian miner to "Sector Perform" due to concerns about a potential iron ore glut and declining prices. The bank projects iron ore prices to drop to US$90.00/t in the second half of 2026, despite growing port inventories in China, which influences Vale's cash flow. Investors are also monitoring broader mining consolidation discussions and upcoming U.S. jobs data, as well as Vale's financial statements release in February.

feed.title: Mgm Resorts International Announces Fourth Quarter And Full Year 2025 Earnings Release Date
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has announced the release date for its Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 earnings. The announcement was made through a news item from Reuters/Refinitiv. The article provides only a headline, indicating no further details are available within the text.

feed.title: VICI Properties Inc: The Quiet Powerhouse Rewiring the Casino Real Estate Game
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. has transformed casino and entertainment real estate into a scalable, yield-focused product, operating as an experiential net lease REIT. The company owns prestigious assets like Caesars Palace and MGM Grand, leasing them to major operators through long-term, triple-net contracts. This model provides stable, inflation-sensitive income, differentiates VICI from competitors, and positions it as a key player in the experiential real estate market for income-focused investors.

feed.title: Form 424B2 JPMORGAN CHASE & CO
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering Structured Investments Review Notes linked to the MerQube US Large-Cap Vol Advantage Index, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are designed for investors seeking early exit at a premium if the index reaches a specific call value, but involve risks including potential principal loss due to a 6.0% per annum daily deduction on the index and the credit risks of both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co. The notes do not pay interest and have limited appreciation potential, with final terms and valuation to be provided in the pricing supplement.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust: This REIT Thinks They Are Undervalued (NYSE:CPT)
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust is redirecting its strategy from development to share repurchases, believing its shares are undervalued in the current multifamily market, which is experiencing oversupply. The company is actively selling assets at favorable cap rates and using the proceeds to buy back shares at higher implied yields, having already executed $50 million in repurchases with a substantial authorization remaining. While this strategy addresses the valuation gap and market conditions, potential risks include the timing of asset sales and political uncertainties like a possible institutional homeownership ban.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts Crown Castle Price Target to $97 From $107, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has revised its price target for Crown Castle (CCI) to $97, down from $107, while reiterating an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst movements, including a downgrade by New Street to "Neutral" with a target of $93. Crown Castle specializes in owning and leasing shared wireless infrastructure, primarily tower and rooftop spaces, and also provides network services.

feed.title: BNY Extends Digital Cash Capabilities for Institutional Clients
feed.summary: BNY has launched a new capability to tokenize client deposit balances on its Digital Assets platform, aiming to advance programmable, on-chain cash for institutional market infrastructure. This initiative extends BNY's cash capabilities by creating on-chain digital book entries for existing demand deposit claims, operating on a private, permissioned blockchain with established risk frameworks. The move is designed to reduce settlement friction, improve liquidity efficiency in collateral and margin workflows, and enable programmable payments, with various financial institutions and digital asset participants supporting the effort.

feed.title: American Express to Participate in UBS Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: American Express Company (NYSE: AXP) announced its management will participate in the UBS Financial Services Conference on February 10, 2026, starting at 1:00 p.m. ET. A live audio webcast will be available on the American Express Investor Relations website, with an audio replay accessible afterward. This conference will cover the company's business strategy and financial performance.

feed.title: Lilly joins Schrödinger, Revvity for AI drug discovery (update)
feed.summary: Eli Lilly has announced collaborations with Schrödinger and Revvity to integrate their drug development software into Lilly's TuneLab AI-based drug discovery platform. Schrödinger's LiveDesign platform will be incorporated, enhancing Lilly's AI-driven drug discovery efforts. This partnership aims to leverage advanced technology to accelerate pharmaceutical innovation.

feed.title: American Express to Participate in UBS Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: American Express Company announced its management will participate in the UBS Financial Services Conference on February 10, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. ET. A live audio webcast of the discussion on the company’s business strategy and financial performance will be available on the American Express Investor Relations website, with an audio replay provided afterward. The company reiterates its identity as a global payments and premium lifestyle brand providing differentiated products and services.

feed.title: During Beijing Visit, Bob Iger Says Disney Will Keep Investing in China
feed.summary: During a meeting with China's Vice Premier Ding Xuexiang, Disney CEO Bob Iger affirmed the company's commitment to continuing its investment and expansion in China. Iger expressed confidence in China's development and aims to promote exchanges and cooperation between the United States and China. Disney has a significant presence in China, with two resorts and successful film releases like "Zootopia 2" in the country.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Ross Stores Price Target to $205 From $200, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Ross Stores (ROST) to $205 from $200, while reiterating an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on the apparel and accessories retailer. The article also notes recent price target adjustments from other financial institutions, including JPMorgan, UBS, Jefferies, Gordon Haskett, Baird, TD Cowen, and BofA Securities, indicating multiple analysts are re-evaluating their positions on Ross Stores.

feed.title: Akari Therapeutics Releases New CEO Corner Segment Highlighting 2025 Progress and Path to Clinical Transition In 2026
feed.summary: Akari Therapeutics has released a new CEO Corner segment featuring CEO Abizer Gaslightwala, highlighting the company's progress in 2025 and its path to becoming a clinical-stage oncology company in 2026. The company is developing novel antibody drug conjugates (ADCs) with its proprietary PH1 spliceosome-modulating payload, which offers a dual mechanism of action for direct tumor cell cytotoxicity and immune activation. Akari aims to initiate its First-in-Human clinical trial by late 2026/early 2027 for its lead candidate, AKTX-101.

feed.title: North of South Capital LLP Raises Stake in Vipshop Holdings Limited $VIPS
feed.summary: North of South Capital LLP has increased its stake in Vipshop Holdings Limited (NYSE:VIPS) by 4.1%, now owning 3,355,999 shares, which represents about 6.3% of its portfolio. Other major institutional investors like Goldman Sachs, Millennium Management, and MIRAE have also increased or established positions, bringing institutional ownership to 48.82%. Vipshop is currently trading near $18.37 with analysts maintaining a "Hold" consensus rating and an average price target of $20.38.

feed.title: New Analyst Forecast: $AFYA Given $18 Price Target
feed.summary: UBS analyst Andre Salles has set an $18 price target for AFYA, aligning with the median target from three analysts over the last six months. Other analysts like Marcelo Santos (JP Morgan) and Leandro Bastos (Citigroup) have differing targets of $22 and $14, respectively. The article also notes recent institutional investor activity for AFYA stock, with some institutions increasing their positions and others decreasing them.

feed.title: Should Teva’s Q3 Beat and New Schizophrenia and Denosumab Moves Require Action From TEVA Investors?
feed.summary: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries exceeded Q3 analyst expectations and made progress with its pipeline, including an FDA New Drug Application for a schizophrenia treatment and EU approval for denosumab biosimilars. These advancements support Teva's strategic shift toward an innovative biopharmaceutical company, though the company still faces challenges with its significant debt and the uncertain uptake of biosimilars. Investors are weighing contrasting views on the company's future, with varying fair value estimates highlighting the complexity of its investment narrative.

feed.title: Cango Inc. Secures $10.5 Million Investment from EWCL to Accelerate Growth
feed.summary: Cango Inc. has secured a $10.5 million investment from Enduring Wealth Capital Limited (EWCL) through the issuance of additional Class B ordinary shares at $1.50 per share. This investment will increase EWCL's shareholding to approximately 4.69% and its voting power to about 49.61%. The capital will accelerate Cango's growth initiatives, including strengthening Bitcoin mining operations and developing its energy and AI compute platform.

feed.title: Walker & Dunlop Arranges $19.1M in Financing for Bronx Affordable Housing Project
feed.summary: Walker & Dunlop has secured $19.1 million in financing for Melrose Concourse, a 72-unit affordable housing development planned for The Bronx. The funding includes a $6.3 million permanent loan from Freddie Mac and a $12.8 million equity investment. The project will reserve all units for renters earning 30 to 70 percent of the area median income, with 23 units designated for seniors.

feed.title: Rothberg of Butterfly Network sells $4.7m in shares
feed.summary: Jonathan M. Rothberg, a director and significant owner of Butterfly Network (NASDAQ:BFLY), sold over 1.1 million shares of Class A Common Stock between January 6 and January 8, 2026, totaling approximately $4.7 million. These sales were conducted under a pre-arranged trading plan, with shares sold at average prices ranging from $4.0294 to $4.1822. Despite these transactions, Rothberg maintains a substantial stake in the company through various entities.

feed.title: FP.SW TotalEnergies SE SIX CHF55.21 (09 Jan 2026): 3.06M vol intraday insight
feed.summary: TotalEnergies SE (FP.SW) stock is trading at CHF55.21 on the SIX exchange with high intraday volume of 3.06 million shares, showing a small gain of 0.13% on January 9, 2026. The company exhibits solid fundamentals with a low P/E ratio of 8.72 and a 4.32% dividend yield, despite recent mixed earnings and revenue misses. Meyka AI rates FP.SW with a "BUY" suggestion and projects significant upside, forecasting a 1-year price target of CHF79.76.

feed.title: WGO: Truist Securities Maintains Buy, Raises Price Target to $47
feed.summary: Truist Securities has reiterated its "Buy" rating for Winnebago Industries (WGO) and increased its price target from $46 to $47, signaling continued confidence in the company's prospects. This follows several other analysts who also raised their price targets for Winnebago in late 2025. Winnebago, a manufacturer of RVs, boats, and specialty vehicles, reported $2.8 billion in fiscal 2025 revenue and an average analyst target price of $48.09, suggesting an 11.22% upside from its current price.

feed.title: (AQN) Optimized Trading Opportunities (AQN:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides optimized trading opportunities for Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (AQN:CA), with specific long and short trading plans including target prices and stop-loss recommendations. It also presents strong AI-generated ratings for AQN:CA across near, mid, and long terms, and lists recent related articles for further information.

feed.title: What to Expect From Cencora's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
feed.summary: Cencora, Inc. (COR) is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings on February 4th, with analysts projecting an 8.3% increase in EPS to $4.04. The company, which distributes pharmaceutical products globally, has consistently surpassed Street bottom-line estimates. Cencora's stock has significantly outpaced the S&P 500 and the Health Care Select Sector SPDR ETF over the past year, reflecting a highly bullish analyst consensus.

feed.title: Willis Lease Finance Explores Strategic Alternatives for UK Unit
feed.summary: Willis Lease Finance Corp (WLFC) announced on January 6, 2026, its decision to explore strategic options for its UK unit, including a potential sale. This move signifies a shift in the company's strategy, as it will cease further investment in Willis Sustainable Fuels (UK). The decision was disclosed in an SEC filing dated January 9, 2026.

feed.title: Alibaba logistics unit Cainiao opens US-Mexico cross-border service
feed.summary: Alibaba's logistics arm, Cainiao, has launched a new cross-border service between the US and Mexico. This service aims to reduce costs for parcel delivery in one of the region's highest-traffic corridors, with Cainiao controlling key logistical nodes including sorting, line-haul transfer, and last-mile delivery using its own local networks. The company expects to cover 99% of the Mexican market and offer prices approximately 60% lower than the current market average.

feed.title: Verizon-Frontier deal faces another hurdle
feed.summary: Verizon's proposed acquisition of Frontier Communications is facing new hurdles regarding broadband deployment commitments, particularly in California. While issues related to diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) have been a major focus, the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) is now pressing for specific deployment mandates that Verizon considers too costly and difficult for remote areas. Both parties are seeking compromises to allow the deal to proceed, potentially pushing the CPUC vote to February.

feed.title: Oregon Public Employees Retirement Fund Purchases 195,519 Shares of AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: The Oregon Public Employees Retirement Fund increased its stake in AT&T Inc. by 31.4% in the third quarter, purchasing an additional 195,519 shares to own a total of 817,293 shares valued at approximately $23.08 million. AT&T recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2775 per share, yielding about 4.6% annually. Wall Street analysts currently rate AT&T as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target price of $29.42, while the stock trades near $24.19.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Peter Farrell Sells 2,000 Shares of ResMed Inc (RMD)
feed.summary: Peter Farrell, a Director at ResMed Inc (RMD), sold 2,000 shares of the company on January 7, 2026. Following this transaction, Farrell now owns 66,773 shares. ResMed Inc, which develops and distributes products for respiratory conditions, has seen 46 insider sells and no buys over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $248.83, and its price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.94 suggests it is fairly valued.

feed.title: State of Alaska Department of Revenue Purchases 22,168 Shares of Philip Morris International Inc. $PM
feed.summary: The State of Alaska Department of Revenue increased its stake in Philip Morris International Inc. by 11.6% in Q3, purchasing 22,168 shares to hold a total of 213,793 shares valued at approximately $34.68 million. Philip Morris recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.47, resulting in an annual dividend of $5.88 and a 3.7% yield. Analysts maintain a broadly positive outlook on the stock, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $189.00, despite some recent target trims by major banks.
